$entry..validate: newData.hasChildren(['name','score','time']) && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length <= 30 && newData.child('score').isNumber() && newData.child('score').val() >= 0 && newData.child('score').val() <= 99999 && newData.child('time').isNumber()
